examples.text: They're TypeScript, they're Python, they're running on a container, on a Lambda, on a virtual machine, and we provide them identities, which is the non-humans identity. Exactly. So what we're going to show you are what are the truly gaping holes that organizations introduce into their end-to-end identity access management processes when they deploy agentic AI. And that means almost everybody.

source.text: Agentic Runtime Security Explained: Securing Non‑Human Identities
